## User Outcome

Describe the user or scientific workflow this changes.

## Compatibility And Safety

- [ ] Raw-data protection, review gates, provenance, and lawful-access boundaries are preserved.
- [ ] Migration and rollback behavior is documented when applicable.
- [ ] No credentials, private research data, browser state, or developer-machine paths are included.
- [ ] Capability maturity labels remain accurate.

## Verification

List focused tests, full tests, platform checks, package checks, and manual evidence.

## Known Limits

State any unsupported inputs, deferred work, or residual risks.
